# Proposal Template

Date:

## Objective

Create a clean, mobile-friendly website that helps {{client_name}} present its services clearly, build trust, and make it easy for customers to contact the business.

## Scope

Included:

- up to {{page_count}} pages,
- responsive design,
- contact form,
- service sections,
- basic SEO setup,
- launch support.

Not included unless specifically added:

- ongoing SEO services,
- custom software features,
- paid advertising,
- original photography,
- logo design,
- copywriting beyond agreed scope.

## Content and Asset Assumptions

- client will provide or approve final logos, photos, testimonials, and business details,
- any draft concepts based on public business information are for planning only,
- no final site will be published until content approval is received.

## Timeline

- kickoff: {{date}}
- first draft: {{date}}
- revision window: {{date}}
- target launch: {{date}}

Timeline depends on timely client feedback and content delivery.
